must_not_claim: UI can complete end-to-end workflows without Core CLI

p1_blockers.reason: A safe desktop Core CLI bridge contract is tested, but the Workbench pages still render mock/contract data and do not wire file selection, build, query, document generation, Agent runtime, storage/memory reports, or provider settings into end-to-end operations.

recommended_fix_before_v4: Wire desktop pages to the local Core bridge for workspace setup, file selection, KB build, query/verify, document generation, Agent/Skill creation, Agent runtime, reports, and provider settings; keep web runtime non-executing unless a local backend is explicitly started.
